headline: I’ve tested the latest Switch 2 controllers, and this one is the best
summary: Expert review identifies the top controller for Nintendo Switch 2. The $89 Switch 2 Pro Controller offers a 3.5mm headphone jack. It also boasts superior tactile feedback and controls.

headline: Anthropic and OpenAI take their beef to the midterm elections
summary: AI rivals Anthropic and OpenAI are now influencing midterm elections. This highlights the growing intersection of tech and politics. The article is part of a newsletter on tech-political collisions.

headline: Vibe coding is coming to your phone
summary: New technology, "vibe coding," is poised to arrive on mobile phones. This promises more intuitive and responsive app interactions. It aims to deliver on the original App Store's "there's an app for that" promise.

headline: Volvo is trying to put its EV stumbles in the rearview
summary: Volvo is working to overcome past difficulties in its EV market strategy. The compact EX40 has been a successful EV model for the brand. Volvo aims to solidify its position in the competitive electric vehicle industry.

headline: The Legion RTX 5090 Gaming PC Drops to the Lowest Price of the Year During the Lenovo Memorial Day Sale
summary: The powerful Legion RTX 5090 Gaming PC is at its lowest price ever. It features a top-tier RTX 5090 GPU and 64GB of RAM. This deal is part of the ongoing Lenovo Memorial Day Sale.

headline: Official Xbox Wireless Controllers Start at Just $39 During the Lenovo Memorial Day Sale
summary: Official Xbox Wireless Controllers are on sale, starting at just $39. These controllers are highly rated for both PC and Xbox gaming. The discount is part of the Lenovo Memorial Day Sale.

headline: The New 2026 Apple iPad Air with M4 Chip Drops to a New All-Time Low Price Ahead of Memorial Day
summary: The new 2026 Apple iPad Air with the M4 chip is at a record low price. Shoppers can save $80 compared to Apple Store prices. This special deal is available before Memorial Day.

headline: Michelle Pfeiffer Reveals the Hilarious Wardrobe Challenges Behind Her Margo's Got Money Troubles Character
summary: Michelle Pfeiffer shared humorous details about her Apple TV role. She discussed prosthetic challenges for her "Margo's Got Money Troubles" character. Co-star Greg Kinnear was reportedly shocked by the revelations.

headline: Women who died in sea off Brighton were sisters
summary: Three sisters tragically died in an incident off the Brighton coast. Their father expressed immeasurable pain over the loss of his daughters. Investigations into the circumstances of their deaths are ongoing.

headline: Russian jets 'dangerously' intercept RAF spy plane over Black Sea
summary: Russian jets "dangerously" intercepted an unarmed RAF Rivet Joint spy plane. The incident occurred over the Black Sea during a routine flight. The UK Ministry of Defence confirmed the intercepts.

headline: Fuel duty freeze extended until the end of the year
summary: The government has extended the fuel duty freeze until year-end. This continues a 5p cut originally enacted in March 2022. The measure aims to ease costs for motorists.

headline: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
summary: Supermarkets are resisting calls to cap prices on essential food items. A minister confirmed talks but stated no mandatory caps will be imposed. This follows government pressure to address rising food costs.
